name: SEO Analyzer API
description: Analyze any webpage for SEO factors including meta tags, headings, links, Open Graph, structured data, and get an overall SEO score with breakdown.
long_description:
A comprehensive SEO Analyzer API built on Cloudflare Workers. Analyze any public webpage and get detailed SEO insights: title tag, meta description, heading structure (H1-H6), image alt attributes, internal/external links, canonical URL, robots meta, Open Graph tags, Twitter Card, JSON-LD structured data, word count, language, viewport, favicon, hreflang tags, and an overall SEO score with detailed breakdown. Perfect for SEO audits, competitor analysis, and automated site monitoring.

💎 FREE tier available! Upgrade to Pro for 50,000 requests/month, higher rate limits, and priority support. Ultra and Mega plans available for enterprise-scale usage.

endpoints.name: Full SEO Analysis
endpoints.description: Complete SEO analysis of a webpage

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL of the webpage to analyze

endpoints.name: SEO Score
endpoints.description: Get SEO score with detailed breakdown

endpoints.name: API Info
endpoints.description: Get API information and available endpoints
